onChange.script:
if origin == 'BindingWriteback':
		data = self.custom.instance
		data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
		data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
#		system.perspective.print(data)
		resp = BlueRidge.Config.ExtensionType.update(data)
		if resp == -1:
			system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
			pass

if origin == 'BindingWriteback':
		data = self.custom.paramDefault
		if data:
			data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
#			system.perspective.print('Running Change Script1 {}'.format(data))
			data = data[0]
#			system.perspective.print('Running Change Script2 {}'.format(data))
			data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
#			system.perspective.print('Running Change Script3 {}'.format(data))
	#		system.perspective.print(data)
			resp = BlueRidge.Config.ParamDefault.update(data)
			if resp == -1:
#				system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
				pass

transforms.code:
value = [v for v in value['value'] if v['operationTypeUUID'] == value['key']]
	return value

config.script:
data = self.view.custom.instance
	data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
	data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	resp1 = BlueRidge.Config.ExtensionType.update(data)
	if resp1 == -1:
		pass
	
	datas = self.view.custom.tableData
	datas = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(datas)
	for data in datas:
		data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
		data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
		resp2 = BlueRidge.Config.ParamDefault.update(data)
		if resp2 == -1:
			pass
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

data = self.view.custom.instance
	data = system.util.jsonEncode(data)
	resp = BlueRidge.Config.ExtensionType.update(data)
	system.perspective.print("Update Button: {}".format(resp))
	if resp == 'success':
		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

messageHandlers.script:
row = payload.get('row')
	value = payload.get('value')
	tableData = self.view.custom.tableData
	if len(tableData) >= row:
		self.view.custom.tableData[row].Assignment = value
